panels.title: CPU Busy
panels.description: Overall CPU busy percentage (averaged across all cores)

targets.expr:
from(bucket: "telegraf")
  |> range($start, $stop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "node_cpu")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["mode"] == "idle")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["instance"] == "$node")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["job"] == "$job")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: $__rate_interval, fn: mean)
  |> difference(columns: ["_value"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value / $__rate_interval}))
  |> group(columns: ["instance", "job"])
  |> mean(column: "_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: 100.0 * (1.0 - r._value)}))

panels.title: RAM Used
panels.description: Real RAM usage excluding cache and reclaimable memory

panels.title: CPU Basic
panels.description: CPU time spent busy vs idle, split by activity type

targets.expr:
from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range($timeRange)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "node_cpu_seconds_total")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["instance"] == "$node")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["job"] == "$job")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["mode"] == "system")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> difference(columns: ["_value"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: r._value / v.windowPeriod }))
  |> mean(column: "_value")

from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "node_cpu_seconds_total")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["instance"] == v.node)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["job"] == v.job)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["mode"] == "user")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> difference(columns: ["_value"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: r._value / v.windowPeriod }))
  |> group(columns: ["_time", "instance", "job", "mode"])
  |> mean(column: "_value")

from(bucket: "telegraf")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "node_cpu")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "seconds_total")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["instance"] == "${node}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["job"] == "${job}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["mode"] == "idle")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> difference(columns: ["_value"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: r._value / v.windowPeriod }))
  |> group(columns: ["_measurement", "instance", "job", "mode"])
  |> mean()

panels.title: Disk Space Used Basic
panels.description: Percentage of filesystem space used for each mounted device

targets.expr:
from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "node_filesystem_size_bytes")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["instance"] == "${node}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["job"] == "${job}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["device"] != "rootfs")
  |> pivot(rowKey:["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
    r with
    _value: (r._value - r.node_filesystem_avail_bytes) / r._value * 100.0
  }))
  |> yield(name: "result")

panels.title: Disk Average Wait Time
panels.description: Average time for requests issued to the device to be served. This includes the time spent by the requests in queue and the time spent servicing them.

targets.expr:
from(bucket: "your_bucket")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "node_disk_reads_completed_total")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["instance"] == "${node}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["job"] == "${job}")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: rate, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with "reads_rate": r._value }))
  |> yield(name: "reads")

from(bucket: "your_bucket")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "node_disk_read_time_seconds_total")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["instance"] == "${node}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["job"] == "${job}")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: rate, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with "time_rate": r._value }))
  |> yield(name: "time")

// Join and calculate
join(tables: {reads: reads, time: time}, on: ["instance", "job", "_time"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      r with
      _value: if r.reads_rate > 0.0 then (r.time_rate / r.reads_rate) else 0.0
    }))
  |> yield(name: "result")

from(bucket: "your_bucket")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "node_disk_writes_completed_total")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["instance"] == "${node}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["job"] == "${job}")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: rate, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with "write_rate": r._value}))
  |> yield(name: "writes")

from(bucket: "your_bucket")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "node_disk_write_time_seconds_total")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["instance"] == "${node}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["job"] == "${job}")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: rate, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with "time_rate": r._value}))
  |> yield(name: "times")

// Join and calculate average latency (time / count), filtering where rate > 0
join(tables: {writes: yield(name: "writes"), times: yield(name: "times")}, on: ["instance", "job", "device"], method: "inner")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      r with
      _value: if r.write_rate > 0.0 then r.time_rate / r.write_rate else 0.0
n    }))
  |> yield(name: "result")

title: Node Exporter Full (5-panel demo) (migrated to InfluxDB Flux)
_source_note: 5-panel subset of the real 'Node Exporter Full' community dashboard (Grafana ID 1860), curated for a short recorded demo: 2 simple single-query gauges (easy wins), 1 multi-query timeseries panel, and 2 panels with label filters / boolean logic likely to trigger needs_review flags.
